灶门炭治郎，日之呼吸的继承者，在与鬼舞辻无惨的最终决战中燃尽生命。
再次睁开眼，他带着前世的记忆，回到了故事的起点。
为了改变大家惨死的悲剧，炭治郎决定这一世要更强、更拼命，把所有悲剧扼杀在摇篮里！
但他不知道的是，因为灵魂过于纯粹温暖，重生后的他自带了一种名为“绝对引力”的被动技能。
只要靠近他，所有心怀执念与伤痛的人，都会被这股温暖安抚，进而衍生出疯狂的占有欲。
于是，拯救世界的画风开始变得越来越奇怪——
水柱（富冈义勇）： 默默把水柱宅邸的门锁换成了特制的，面无表情地挡在所有人面前：“他是我引荐的师弟，也就是我的人。谁也不准碰。”
炎柱（炼狱杏寿郎）： 热情地将他拥入怀中，毫无边界感：“灶门少年！你的体温太棒了！今晚也来我的房间进行‘贴身’特训吧！”
甚至连某位上弦和鬼王： “变成鬼吧！这样你那温暖的灵魂，就能永远只属于我一个人了！”
身处修罗场风暴中心的炭治郎一脸茫然地握紧日轮刀：“大家今天也是斗志满满呢！太好了，这样一定能顺利斩杀无惨！”
众柱（拔刀互砍）：谁管无惨啊！先把你的咸猪手从炭治郎的腰上拿开！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/815b830eb760994c5e83a5ead88cadee~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大白兔糖奶","author_id":"","book_id":"7609034999433546777","book_name":"鬼灭：重生后全员all炭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":454,"name":"可盐可甜","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=454&name=可盐可甜&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609035007541117465","read_count":"27968","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"255223"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"75","tags":"双男主,衍生,独宠,团宠,可盐可甜,同人,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/815b830eb760994c5e83a5ead88cadee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302236&x-signature=Qp%2BSb32kPwHEhEkAOljyTxx9UwI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3853166974868747","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023716EDA7D574CF0C77C7C9D
